instruction:
In Obsidian, create a new note called "Inbox/Vendor Call Notes.md" and set its content exactly to:

# Vendor Call Notes

- confirm migration date
- ask about support coverage on weekends
reference_command:
content=$(printf '%b' '# Vendor Call Notes

- confirm migration date
- ask about support coverage on weekends
'); obsidian-cli create "Inbox/Vendor Call Notes.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

parameters.expected_content:
# Vendor Call Notes

- confirm migration date
- ask about support coverage on weekends
